posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow regular automations to detect/trigger when a person is removed from a person column.

What are you trying to achieve

When a person is removed from a person column, allow triggering of regular automation. At the moment, only adding people works as a trigger.

Removing a person works as a trigger for workflows, but not for regular board automations.
